creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Shafer from comment #3)

As I already told you in IRC you did a great job in this port however rules are rules and I am not the one with power to approve deviations. I've just pointed you what the current rules say.

So, it is up to the maintainer to approve it as-is, but I advise you to open a review on the Phab, and beyond the maintainer also add @python and @portmgr and try to convince them.

https://reviews.freebsd.org/

If they approve, I will be glad to commit it.

Thank you.
